overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The player crosses a wide intersection, walks along sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards, and gazes up at the iconic Kiroshi building while heading toward an elevated highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: pedestrians walk across the crosswalk in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward a futuristic hotel building

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in dark clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: tall modern building with neon accents and glass facade featuring illuminated signage
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with glowing edges
vertical pole with red illuminated signal light
tropical palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wide futuristic intersection at night, with the camera positioned on a striped crosswalk. Neon-lit buildings surround the plaza, and pedestrians cross paths with the player. A large hotel building dominates the view across the street while palm trees line the median.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with concrete benches and large digital advertisements

events.description: turns left off the crosswalk into a plaza area with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the sidewalk and walking past a landscaped plaza area with seating

entered.detail: concrete seating platforms with integrated planters and small trees
tall vertical billboard with red text reading BODY WITHOUT LIMITS
modern horizontal slat barrier with warm integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning left from the crosswalk, the scene transitions to a semi-covered plaza with modern benches and planters. A large vertical billboard advertising 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' stands on the left, while a slatted metal wall runs along the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk beneath towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the top of the Kiroshi skyscraper
camera tilts back down to street level view

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk while looking up at the towering advertisements on the Kiroshi building

notable_agents.action: lone pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with large vertical digital billboard displaying a monochrome face and KIROSHI text
curved elevated roadway with glowing cyan accent lights spanning across the street
multiple large illuminated advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows between towering structures, with the massive Kiroshi skyscraper dominating the view ahead. The camera tilts up to admire the building's height and massive digital displays, then returns to street level. An elevated highway curves overhead with cyan neon lighting, while the slatted wall continues alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street approaching elevated highway overpass with commercial billboards

events.description: red sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the illuminated overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving away from camera down the street

entered.detail: large digital sign with EL CAPITAN text and animal imagery on the building facade
tall modern street lights with blue neon accents lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the street, the El Capitan billboard becomes prominent on the left while the Kiroshi tower recedes into the distance. A red sports car passes by on the street as the camera approaches the elevated highway overpass. Modern street lamps with blue neon lighting line the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic district, moving from a wide open intersection into the narrow corridors of a towering skyscraper canyon. It begins on a striped crosswalk at a bustling nighttime plaza, where neon-lit buildings and palm trees frame the view of a large hotel across the street. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts into a semi-covered plaza characterized by modern benches and a massive vertical billboard advertising body enhancements. The scene then narrows between towering structures, tilting upward to capture the immense height of the Kiroshi skyscraper and its digital displays before the view settles back toward a cyan-lit elevated highway curving overhead. Finally, the camera advances past an El Capitan billboard and a passing red sports car, moving under blue neon street lamps as it approaches the highway overpass.
